Description: Unique internal identifier for credit facility record. Must identify facility for its entire life and be unique. If changed (migration/acquisition), provide Original/Previous in Field 35.
Allowable Values: Unique within submission and over time. No carriage return, line feed, comma, or unprintable characters.

Description: Report obligor name on the loan. Full legal entity name desirable. For individuals (Natural Persons), substitute with "Individual".
Allowable Values: No vertical bar, carriage return, line feed, comma, or unprintable characters.

Description: Report per FR Y-9C: amortized cost for HFI, lower of cost/fair value for HFS, fair value for FVO. Fully undrawn commitments = 0. Disposed = 0.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar amount (e.g. 20000000). No dollar sign, commas, or decimal.

Description: Report integer code for HC-C line number. If multiple loans, report type with largest share of committed balance.
Allowable Values: 1=1-4 family res construction domestic; 2=Other construction/land development domestic; 3=Multifamily domestic; 4=DO NOT USE; 5=Other nonfarm nonresidential domestic; 6=DO NOT USE; 7=CRE non-domestic offices

Description: Total commitment = HC-C financing receivables + unused from HC-F/HC-G/HC-L. Pro-rata for multiple lenders. Commitments to commit: total approved and offered.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar amount (e.g. 20000000). No dollar sign, commas, or decimal.

Description: Cumulative net charge-offs over life of credit facility. If exceeds current but less than original commitment, report total. Disposed: as of disposition date.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar. 0 if no charge-off. NA for HFS or FVO.

Description: Indicate if CRE loan is participated/syndicated and if part of SNC. Fronting exposures = No.
Allowable Values: 1=No; 2=Yes syndicate/participant not SNC; 3=Yes agent not SNC; 4=Yes participant in SNC; 5=Yes agent in SNC

Description: First lien, subordinated, mixed, or B-Note. Partnership interest pledges = subordinate. B-Note = structurally subordinated position on senior lien.

Report predominant property type by highest collateral value. Mixed if none predominates. Land and Lot Development only for land/lot phase. If includes vertical construction, report appropriate category.

Contractual date of credit agreement. Major modifications use revised date. Extensions/covenants/waivers/maturity changes/re-pricing/TDR do not change date. Commitments to commit: date terms extended.
Allowable Values: yyyy-mm-dd. Must be <= period end date.

Description: 5-digit ZIP Code for US locations. 2-letter ISO country code for foreign. Multiple if no property predominates.
Allowable Values: ZIP code (leading zeroes required); 2-letter country code; or Multiple

Description: NOI at origination: all operating income net of operating expenses except debt service and depreciation. Land/construction not generating income = NA. Participations prorated. Cross-collateralized: total NOI from pool.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar. 0 if actually zero. NA for non-income land/construction. Negative sign for negatives.

Description: Property value at origination from appraisal or evaluation (12 CFR 34). Prorated for bank ownership. Multiple properties: sum of values. Cross-collateralized: sum of all.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar. No dollar signs, commas, or decimals.

Description: Indicate if Value in Field 13 was as is, as stabilized, or as completed per SR10-16.
Bank's internal obligor rating for PD. Format: rating-code:fraction pairs separated by semicolons. All fractions must sum to 1.
Allowable Values: Rating-code:decimal pairs (e.g. AAA:1 or A:0.5;C:0.5). Must be consistent with H.4 Field 1.

Description: Advanced: IRB PD parameter. Defaulted = 1. Non-advanced: PD for Internal Rating. If no PD assigned, NA.
Allowable Values: Decimal to 4 places (e.g. 50%=0.5000). No scientific notation. NA if not assigned.

Description: Advanced: IRB LGD at loan level (dollar weighted avg for multiple). Non-advanced: LGD from credit risk system. If not assigned, NA.
Allowable Values: Decimal to 2 places (e.g. 50%=0.50). No scientific notation. NA if not assigned.

Description: Advanced: IRB EAD parameter (dollar weighted avg for multiple). Non-advanced: EAD from internal system. If not assigned, NA.
Allowable Values: Rounded whole dollar (e.g. 20000000). No dollar sign, commas, or decimal. NA if not assigned.
